name: NASA MCP Server
what_it_does: NASA MCP server enabling AI agents to access NASA's public data APIs — retrieving the Astronomy Picture of the Day, querying exoplanet archives, accessing Mars rover imagery and weather data, searching the NASA image library, and integrating NASA's scientific datasets into agent-driven astronomy and space research workflows.
use_cases: Retrieving NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day from educational agents
Querying exoplanet data from astronomy research agents
Accessing Mars rover photos and weather from space exploration agents
Searching NASA's image and video library from media agents
Getting Earth observation data from environmental analysis agents
Enriching astronomy content with NASA data from content creation agents
not_for: Real-time satellite tracking (use dedicated tracking APIs)
Commercial space data beyond what NASA offers publicly
best_when: An agent needs access to NASA's rich collection of public space data — astronomy images, exoplanet data, Mars mission data, and more — for research, education, or content creation.
avoid_when: You need commercial space data, satellite tracking, or real-time astronomical data beyond NASA's APIs.

auth.notes: NASA API key optional but recommended. Free API key from api.nasa.gov increases rate limits. DEMO_KEY available without registration at lower limits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: NASA API: completely free; 30 req/hour without key, 1,000 req/hour with key
pricing.paid_tiers: None — NASA APIs are public and free
pricing.notes: NASA APIs are completely free public APIs. MCP is free community project. No costs.

known_agent_gotchas: DEMO_KEY rate limit (30/hour) is very restrictive — register for free API key
Some NASA APIs have higher latency — APOD and imagery can be slow
Image/media data may be large — handle download sizes appropriately
Community MCP — NASA has multiple distinct APIs with different schemas
Not all NASA APIs covered — check which are supported
Exoplanet archive queries can return large datasets
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Free NASA API key. Community MCP. No sensitive data — public scientific data.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Free API key. Public data. Community MCP. No sensitive data.
